name: Public Interfaces
description: Package exports, the format-dispatch API, the Typer CLI, and the optional FastAPI adapter expose Stencil's rendering capabilities to callers.

name: Rendering Engine
description: Format-specific engines render DOCX, XLSX, and PPTX templates and convert rendered Office documents to PDF.

name: Package Support
description: Shared exception definitions, installed-version discovery, and PEP 561 typing metadata support the package's public and rendering modules.

name: Examples and Fixtures
description: Sample payloads, template fixtures, generator scripts, and walkthrough documentation demonstrate reproducible DOCX and PPTX rendering workflows.

name: Test Layer
description: Pytest integration coverage verifies the HTTP adapter and the full DOCX, XLSX, PPTX, and PDF rendering behavior.

name: Project Configuration and Automation
description: Packaging metadata, release automation, dependency updates, and Understand Anything settings govern how office-stencil is built, published, maintained, and analyzed.

name: Documentation
description: The project overview, release history, and Python package CI/CD guide explain usage, evolution, and maintenance practices.
